pages.raw_ocr_text:
1. Public Relations
Meetings were held with farmers near Cheney and contacts with Spokane Bird Club and State Sport Council.

2. Refuge Development
WPA project started on Oct. 28. Experimental planting of wild celery on Pine Creek and Ice Lake.

Predator control continued: coyotes taken monthly July 3, Aug 5, Sept 2, Oct 1, total 11.

3. Economic uses
Haying by 4 farmers produced 120 tons on 140 acres with revenue of $280.00.

No grazing was allowed.
